title: View with ORDER BY misses a row
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 Int32, c1 String, c2 Date);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT 1 AS result FROM t1;
SELECT 1 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL ORDER BY c0;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY removal in view context leads to empty result
